creator: swell.k@gmail.com
text:
Erm, can you reopen it? After 5 month of waiting and been away/busy for
subsequent 3 months I think the PR should be re-evaluated by a committer.

Here is a slightly modified obligatory shar file.

--- jokosher.shar begins here ---
#!/bin/sh
# This is a shell archive
echo x audio/jokosher
mkdir -p audio/jokosher > /dev/null 2>&1
echo x audio/jokosher/pkg-descr
sed 's/^X//' > audio/jokosher/pkg-descr << 'SHAR_END'
XJokosher is a simple yet powerful multi-track studio. With it you can
Xcreate and record music, podcasts and more, all from an integrated
Xsimple environment.
X
XWWW: http://www.jokosher.org/
SHAR_END
echo x audio/jokosher/pkg-plist
sed 's/^X//' > audio/jokosher/pkg-plist << 'SHAR_END'
Xbin/jokosher

X# New ports collection makefile for:	jokosher
X# Date created:				13 Aug 2009
X# Whom:					Anonymous

XCATEGORIES=	audio

XCOMMENT=	Multi-track non-linear audio editing
X
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/xdg/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-xdg \
X		easy_install:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-setuptools
X
XUSE_PYTHON=	yes
XUSE_PYDISTUTILS=yes
XUSE_GSTREAMER=	gnonlin good python
XINSTALLS_ICONS=	yes
X
XWANT_GNOME=	yes
XWANT_GSTREAMER=	yes
X
XOPTIONS=	DBUS	"D-Bus extension" on \
X		FLAC	"Flac export/import" on \
X		GCONF	"Gnome Audio playback/record" on \
X		JACK	"Jack audio playback/record" off \
X		LADSPA	"Instrument effects" on \
X		LAME	"Mp3 export" off \
X		MP3	"Mp3 import" off \
X		PIDGIN	"Pidgin status extension" off \
X		PROFILES "Gnome Audio Profiles extension" off \
X		PULSE	"PulseAudio playback/record" off \
X		VORBIS	"Ogg Vorbis export/import" on
X
X.include <bsd.port.pre.mk>
X
X.if defined(WITH_DBUS)
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	${PYTHON_SITELIBDIR}/dbus/__init__.py:${PORTSDIR}/devel/py-dbus
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_GNOME) || ${HAVE_GNOME:Mgnomehier}!=""
XUSE_GNOME+=	desktopfileutils gnomehier
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_GNOME) || defined(WITH_PROFILES) \
X	|| ${HAVE_GNOME:Mpygnome2}!=""
XUSE_GNOME+=	pygnome2
X.endif
X
X.if defined(WITH_PIDGIN)
X. if defined(WITHOUT_DBUS)
XIGNORE=		requires DBUS support
X. endif
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	pidgin:${PORTSDIR}/net-im/pidgin
X.endif
X
X.if !defined(WITHOUT_OMF) || exists(${LOCALBASE}/bin/scrollkeeper-update)
XRUN_DEPENDS+=	scrollkeeper-update:${PORTSDIR}/textproc/scrollkeeper
XINSTALLS_OMF=	yes
XPLIST_SUB+=	OMF=""
X.else
XPLIST_SUB+=	OMF="@comment "
X.endif
X
X.for plugin in flac gconf jack ladspa lame mp3 pulse vorbis
X. if defined(WITH_${plugin:U})
XUSE_GSTREAMER+=${plugin}
X. endif
X.endfor
X
Xpost-patch:	.SILENT
X	${REINPLACE_CMD} -e 's|/usr/share|${PREFIX}/share|g' -e \
X		'\|scrollkeeper-preinstall|s|HELPURI\[fileNum]|"file://" + &|' \
X		${WRKSRC}/bin/${PORTNAME} ${WRKSRC}/${PYSETUP}
X
X.include <bsd.port.post.mk>
SHAR_END
exit
--- jokosher.shar ends here ---
